atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports severe right elbow pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a new onset of severe right elbow pain approximately one and a half years ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any specific injury or trauma

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ibuprofen 800 mg three times daily for pain relief

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient prescribes ibuprofen 800 mg three times daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports minimal relief with ibuprofen

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no prior sports injuries

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using heavy weights in his workouts

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports not pitching recently

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports not golfing recently

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is expecting a newborn soon

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician diagnoses medial epicondylitis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals limited range of motion on extension of the right elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the medial aspect of the right elbow elicits pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Sensation is intact to light touch in all fingers.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pulses are equal bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pronation and supination are unremarkable on the right elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-rays demonstrate no fractures or bony misalignment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The left elbow demonstrates similar findings, with slightly less pain on flexion and extension, and limited range of motion on extension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI of the right elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends a whole blood transfusion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a whole blood transfusion in the next couple of weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs to follow up in two weeks.
